title: Stored Procedures
description: Membuat dan mengelola stored procedure di MySQL.

commands.name: CREATE PROCEDURE
commands.title: Membuat Procedure
commands.description: Membuat stored procedure — blok kode SQL yang bisa dipanggil berulang.
commands.syntax:
DELIMITER //
CREATE PROCEDURE nama_proc ([param_mode] param tipe, ...)
BEGIN
  -- SQL statements
END //
DELIMITER ;
commands.examples:
DELIMITER //
CREATE PROCEDURE GetUserOrders(IN userId INT)
BEGIN
  SELECT o.id, o.total, o.status, o.created_at
  FROM orders o
  WHERE o.user_id = userId
  ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
END //
DELIMITER ;

-- Procedure dengan OUT parameter
DELIMITER //
CREATE PROCEDURE CountUserOrders(IN userId INT, OUT orderCount INT)
BEGIN
  SELECT COUNT(*) INTO orderCount
  FROM orders WHERE user_id = userId;
END //
DELIMITER ;
commands.notes: DELIMITER diperlukan agar MySQL tidak menginterpretasi ; di dalam procedure sebagai akhir statement.

commands.name: CALL
commands.title: Memanggil Procedure

commands.name: PROCEDURE-FLOW
commands.title: Flow Control

commands.name: DROP PROCEDURE
commands.title: Menghapus Procedure
